meaning: relative biological effect (iveness)(或efficiency)[核]相对生物效应
examples: Content of RBE (Recycling-base Economy) was expatiated, model, method and countermeasures of implementing RBE in waste management in China were discussed.
The inhibiting property for BaSO 4 scaling of phosphoric acid esters of rice bran extract (p RBE) alone and compounded with other scale inhibitors is studied.
